2383320.name: Wind - A Journey to the Sky
2383320.description:
Travel with your sheep through the sky and discover peaceful and relaxing landscapes. Embark on a wonderful adventure as you explore floating islands amidst the clouds and encounter intriguing inhabitants. Gather natural resources around you and cook for your sheep and other creatures, some more voracious than others.

Main features

  • Take your time to explore each area, discover their inhabitants, and secrets. Go at your own pace to fully enjoy the light and poetic experience of Wind - A Journey to the Sky.

  • Gather resources from nature and experiment with cooking to discover delicious recipes that will delight your sheep and other creatures, big and small!

  • Discover and cultivate incredible plants that will allow you to overcome certain obstacles and perhaps even find treasures!

  • Find and collect hats to personalize your sheep. You might be surprised by the results.

  • Sit on the edge of a cliff or on the back of a giant frog and relax in a peaceful atmosphere with soft music.

    Enjoy a moment of relaxation playing Wind - A Journey to the Sky.
